name: accounts.list
description: List configured project profiles from the accounts registry file.

name: accounts.reload
description: Reload accounts registry from disk (updates server cache).

account_id.description: Project profile id (resolves to Direct Client-Login and optional Metrica counter defaults).

apply.description: Must be false for preview tool.

direct_client_login.description: Override Direct Client-Login for this call (agency multi-project support).

name: dashboard.generate_option1
description: Generate a simple HTML+JSON dashboard from Direct+Metrica data (Option 1).

account_id.description: Project profile id (resolves to Direct Client-Login and optional Metrica counter defaults).

account_ids.description: Optional explicit list of account profile ids to include in a multi-account dashboard.

all_accounts.description: When true, generate one dashboard containing data for all configured account profiles (account switcher in UI).

counter_id.description: Metrica counter id (optional if account profile has exactly one).

dashboard_slug.description: Optional suffix for output file names.

direct_client_login.description: Override Direct Client-Login for this call (agency multi-project support).

goal_ids.description: Optional Metrica goal IDs. When set, dashboard will include leads based on goal{ID}reaches (best effort).

include_html.description: Include HTML content in response (default: true if output_dir is not set).

include_raw_reports.description: Include raw Direct/Metrica payloads in output data (default: true).

output_dir.description: When set, write HTML+JSON files to this directory.

return_data.description: Return the full data payload in response (default: false if output_dir is set, otherwise true).

wordstat_max_campaigns.description: Max campaigns to analyze with Wordstat (default: 5).

name: direct.get_changes
description: Get changes since a given timestamp.

account_id.description: Project profile id (resolves to Direct Client-Login and optional Metrica counter defaults).

direct_client_login.description: Override Direct Client-Login for this call (agency multi-project support).

timestamp.description: Timestamp string as required by Direct Changes.checkCampaigns.

name: wordstat.hf.suggest_keywords
description: Human-friendly: suggest keyword candidates from seed phrases (resumable via cursor).

cursor.description: Resume a pending run. Provide either seed_phrases or cursor (exactly one).

max_seed_phrases_per_call.description: How many seeds to process per call (default: 8).

seed_phrases.description: Start a new run. Provide either seed_phrases or cursor (exactly one).

name: wordstat.hf.suggest_negative_keywords
description: Human-friendly: suggest negative keyword tokens from phrases (lexicon-based).

region_type.description: all|cities|regions or REGION_ALL|REGION_CITIES|REGION_REGIONS; sent as Search API region.

phrase.description: Provide either phrase or phrases (exactly one).

phrases.description: Up to 128 phrases. Provide either phrase or phrases (exactly one).

name: wordstat.user_info
description: Wordstat: Search API access check via getRegionsTree.
